basic_details.job_title: GMCH Chandigarh Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Government Medical College & Hospital Chandigarh (GMCH Chandigarh)
basic_details.short_information: Government Medical College & Hospital Chandigarh (GMCH Chandigarh) Project Research Scientist I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of GMCH Chandigarh. Has been announced through the GMCH Chandigarh Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be given as per ICMR/Govt rules to SC/ST/OBC categories on production of appropriate certificate.

qualification.education_qualification: First class MSc, PhD, MSc degree, MBBS / BDS/ MD/DNB
qualification.details: First class MSc in biotechnology/ genetics/ microbiology/immunology PhD in above subjects with at least second class MSc degree MBBS / BDS/ MD/DNB

selection_process: Shortlisting based on qualification and research experience Written Test (if number of candidates more) Interview
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GMCH Chandigarh Project Research Scientist-I (NM) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of applications is 10th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Research Scientist-I (NM) post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualifications include a First Class MSc in biotechnology, genetics, microbiology, or immunology, or a PhD in these subjects with at least a second-class MSc degree, or MBBS/BDS/MD/DNB.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Research Scientist-I (NM) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided to SC/ST/OBC categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist-I (NM) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 56,000 to Rs. 67,200 per month, which includes a base salary and HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this government job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, and submit it along with the required documents to the address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Research Scientist-I (NM) role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their qualifications and research experience, followed by a written test (if necessary) and an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity at Government Medical College & Hospital Chandigarh.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of GMCH Chandigarh. Links are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
